payload.author: claude
payload.body: Epic rollup after the RT-80..RT-91 session: the core promise is shipped — cargo install cargo-trust, strict = true in Cargo.toml, cargo trust build. RT-80 (cargo trust subcommand), RT-81 (project-level strict), RT-82 (strict!{} macro + trust-attrs crate removed; #![strict] and metadata are the only two activation forms), RT-89 (wrapper enforces the FULL lint set — build == check), RT-84 (README two-step story), RT-83 (extension spike: defer indefinitely) all done. Remaining children: RT-86 (lowering-cache integrity) and RT-88 (restore dogfood coverage) — follow-ups, not launch blockers. Bugs found en route now under RT-63: RT-87 (closure args break named-arg parsing — blocks heck-strict), RT-90 (tre-strict R3001 registry mismatch), RT-91 (comment-window offset drift). Both case-study crates were already red at HEAD before this session; they are not in CI, which is how it went unnoticed.
